content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5) but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or feature whatsoever.
Pierre: Apple requires apps using the HomeKit entitlement to provide genuine home-automation functionality; using it in an unrelated wallpaper app is a classic misuse pattern that reviewers flag under 4.5.3, and the `HMHomeManager` instantiation may also trigger an unexpected home-data permission prompt during review. Remove the HomeKit import/entitlement entirely unless there's a hidden home feature not shown in this file — otherwise this will likely cause a rejection.
